evidence: The DB contains an erroneous extra line break after the page number '413' in the citation '907 N.W.2d 413'. The authoritative PDF source (via pdftotext) shows the citation on a single line with no break between '413' and 'to'. The DB text has '413\n to' (with a leading space on the continuation line) while the source has '413 to' (on the same line). This is a mechanical ingestion artifact from citation fragmentation in the markdown pipeline.
